intent: Remove Settings Quick nav and make the title-left icon the only Settings-local route to /files while keeping Back as history navigation.
assumptions: Settings sections and existing form/token/theme behavior remain unchanged.
The title-left Settings icon is the requested home affordance and needs an accessible button name.
risks: Hash quick nav links could be accidentally reintroduced.
Hardcoding Back to /files would regress folder/query preservation.
The icon-only home control must remain keyboard and screen-reader accessible.
